title: Thunder Tour roars into Knysna in support of charity
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The roar of engines and the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The roar of engines and the gleam of chrome lit up Knysna's Thesen Island on Saturday 9 August, as the Thunder Tour Ultimate Roadshow 2025 rolled into town for its grand finale.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The roar of engines and the gleam of chrome lit up Knysna's Thesen Island on Saturday 9 August, as the Thunder Tour Ultimate Roadshow 2025 rolled into town for its grand finale."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Drawing car enthusiasts, families, and locals, the event saw around 82 classic and performance vehicles on display, with over 140 drivers participating in this high-octane celebration."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Thunder Tour, an annual week-long road trip featuring muscle cars, rat rods, street rods and supercars, kicked off in Pretoria and thundered through South Africa before concluding in Knysna.","html":"The Thunder Tour, an annual week-long road trip featuring muscle cars, rat rods, street rods and supercars, kicked off in Pretoria and thundered through South Africa before concluding in Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year's event wasn't just about speed and style, it was about driving change.","html":"This year's event wasn't just about speed and style, it was about driving change."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Round Table Knysna proudly hosted the final leg of the tour, organising a public car show to raise funds for local charities in and around Knysna.","html":"Round Table Knysna proudly hosted the final leg of the tour, organising a public car show to raise funds for local charities in and around Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All proceeds from the event are being donated to those in need, making the day of excitement one with real impact.","html":"All proceeds from the event are being donated to those in need, making the day of excitement one with real impact."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This event was about uniting passion and purpose,\" said Bernie Neser, chairperson of Round Table Knysna.","html":"\"This event was about uniting passion and purpose,\" said Bernie Neser, chairperson of Round Table Knysna."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We approached the Thunder Tour team to bring the finale to Knysna and turn it into something meaningful for our community.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thunder Tour participants also raised additional funds internally throughout the journey, reinforcing the event's strong charitable spirit.","html":"Thunder Tour participants also raised additional funds internally throughout the journey, reinforcing the event's strong charitable spirit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After more than five years of inactivity, Round Table Knysna is back with a new committee, fresh energy, and a clear vision to uplift the community. \"There's so much need in and around Knysna,\" Neser said. \"We're here to serve.\"","html":"After more than five years of inactivity, Round Table Knysna is back with a new committee, fresh energy, and a clear vision to uplift the community. \"There's so much need in and around Knysna,\" Neser said. \"We're here to serve.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With its motto \"Adapt. Adopt. Improve.\", Round Table Knysna is steering full speed ahead, proving that with the right drive, anything is possible.","html":"With its motto \"Adapt. Adopt. Improve.\", Round Table Knysna is steering full speed ahead, proving that with the right drive, anything is possible."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Thunder Tour roars into Knysna in support of charity
